item.name: Recreation_Vaulted_Toilet
item.title: Recreation Vaulted Toilet Layer 1
item.snippet: A layer of vaulted toilet locations maintained by Denver Water at some of our recreation facilities. This layer is built and published for assessing damage to the vaulted toilets in Survey123.
